inputs: SRR24043307-2GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz SRR24043307-5GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz SRR24043307-10GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz

metrics.command_line: ln -s '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/372/inputs/dataset_e8f36f48-64b5-4fbf-a530-c23ae1c203d2.dat' reference.fa && lofreq faidx reference.fa 2>&1 || echo "Error running samtools faidx for indexing fasta reference for lofreq" >&2 &&  ln -s '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/372/inputs/dataset_f11d4690-befd-4552-a62f-abfe64ee8698.dat' reads.bam && ln -s -f '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/372/inputs/metadata_metadata_6ae3f98c-db82-40c2-b8c6-9b9f6030e23b.dat' reads.bam.bai &&   lofreq call-parallel --pp-threads ${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --verbose  --ref 'reference.fa' --out variants.vcf --call-indels   --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000  --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30    --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0  --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter  reads.bam 2>&1  || (tool_exit_code=$? && cat "$TMPDIR/lofreq2_call_parallel*/*.log" 1>&2 && exit $tool_exit_code)
metrics.tool_stdout:
INFO [2026-04-01 05:01:06,130]: Using 2 threads with following basic args: lofreq call --verbose --ref reference.fa --call-indels --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000 --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30 --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0 --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter reads.bam
